title: Tasks
subtitle: Things to do for your circle — assign, track, and check them off.

row.pendingAnnounce: "{{title}}" will be completed. Tap undo to cancel.

empty.openHint: Coordinate the to-dos that keep your loved one's care on track — errands, refills, follow-ups — and share them with everyone helping.
empty.completedHint: Tasks the circle finishes will show up here so everyone can see what's been handled.
empty.allHint: Coordinate the to-dos that keep your loved one's care on track — errands, refills, follow-ups — and share them with everyone helping.

errorHint: Check your connection and try again.
